basic_details.job_title: IBPS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Division Head, Deputy Manager Posts
basic_details.post_name: Deputy Manager - Accounts (Regular) & Division Head (FAS) & CFO (Contract)
basic_details.selection_process_brief: Online Exam + Group Exercise + Interview (for Deputy Manager) / Shortlisting + Interview (for Division Head)
basic_details.short_information: Institute of Banking Personnel Selection (IBPS) Deputy Manager - Accounts, Division Head & CFO Recruitment 2026 has been published on 06 May 2026 at the official website www.ibps.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced under the IBPS Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates within the age range of 23–30 years (Deputy Manager) and 50–61 years (Division Head/CFO) with the required educational qualifications such as Chartered Accountant (CA) / Graduate/Postgraduate in Commerce can apply online from 06 May 2026 to 20 May 2026. The official notification PDFs and online application link are avai

qualification.details: Deputy Manager - Accounts (Grade E - Regular): | Age (as on 01.05.2026): 23 - 30 years Educational Qualification: Chartered Accountant (CA) Experience: Preferably 1 year in Finance, Accounts, Taxation, Investment & Fund Management | Division Head (Financial & Allied Services) & CFO (Contract): | Age (as on 01.05.2026): 50 - 61 years Educational Qualification: Graduate / Post Graduate in Commerce (preferably CAIIB) OR Chartered Accountant Experience: Retired officer with 20-25 years experience in Finance, Accounts, Taxation, Audit, etc. (Preferably Retired GM of Public Sector Bank who worked as CFO or in Accounts Dept. as DGM/GM)

selection_process: Shortlisting of applications Online Examination Group Exercises Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IBPS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IBPS Accounts and Finance Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the IBPS Accounts and Finance Posts is 20-05-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What are the total number of vacancies released by IBPS?
faq.answer: IBPS has released a total of 2 vacancies for Accounts and Finance Posts. These vacancies are for the positions of Division Head (Financial & Allied Services) & CFO and Deputy Manager - Accounts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Deputy Manager - Accounts post?
faq.answer: The mandatory qualification for the Deputy Manager - Accounts post is being a Chartered Accountant (CA). Having at least 1 year of experience in Finance or Accounts is preferable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for General/OBC category candidates?
faq.answer: For General/OBC category candidates, the application fee is ₹1,000/- for regular posts. For contractual posts, the fee is Nil.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these IBPS posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves shortlisting of applications, followed by an Online Examination, Group Exercises, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q6. Can candidates from outside Maharashtra apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The notification mentions that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Maharashtra. It is advisable to check the official notification for specific eligibility regarding domicile.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Division Head (Financial & Allied Services) & CFO post?
faq.answer: The approximate salary for the Division Head (Financial & Allied Services) & CFO post is ₹30.90 lakhs per annum on a consolidated basis.

faq.question: Q8. What is the age cut-off date for the IBPS recruitment?
faq.answer: The age cut-off date for this IBPS recruitment is 01-05-2026. Candidates should ensure their age falls within the specified limits as of this date.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the IBPS Accounts and Finance Posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official IBPS website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section, on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided below. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.
